params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-to-1 multiplexer with a reset functionality. When the reset signal is high, the output will be forced to zero. However, when reset is low, the output will not select any of the four 4-bit input lines (in0, in1, in2, or in3) based on the 2-bit select signal (sel). Instead, the output will always be zero.
